description: Recto: Fragment of a large legal document in Arabic script. An iqrār document. The top and the lower left corner are missing. Names several people and sums of money (e.g., 32 dinars in l. 2). It is not immediately clear if this is related to the document on the verso or not. Verso: Legal document consisting of an acknowledgment (iqrār). In Arabic script. Concerns Muḥammad b. Nāṣir al-Dīn Muḥammad known as al-Ṭaḥḥān ("the Miller") and al-Muʿallim Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. ʿUthmān. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
